reviews.title: The entropy formula for the Ricci flow and its geometric applications
reviews.review_lede: The note introduces an entropy-like functional $\mathcal{F}$ on the space of Riemannian metrics modulo diffeomorphism and rescaling, together with its first variation under Ricci flow. The monotonicity argument hinges on a weighted-Laplaci…

reviews.title: Resolution of singularities for foliated threefolds in characteristic zero
reviews.review_lede: The paper builds on the foliated MMP framework, lifting the threefold resolution proof to the foliated category. The technical heart is a foliated analogue of the maximal contact lemma.

reviews.title: Effective bounds for the Manin–Mumford conjecture over function fields
reviews.review_lede: The paper combines o-minimal counting with a refined Pila–Wilkie argument, but does so over function fields where the model-theoretic input has to be reworked.

reviews.title: Heegaard Floer homology and the L-space conjecture for graph manifolds
reviews.review_lede: The paper completes a decade-long program by handling the remaining graph-manifold case. The earlier work of Hanselman–Rasmussen–Watson reduces the question to a combinatorial condition on JSJ pieces.

reviews.title: Sharp mixing-time bounds for random walks on expander Cayley graphs
reviews.review_lede: Classical mixing-time theory plus a new sharp lower bound based on a return-time argument.

reviews.title: Algebraic K-theory of stable infinity-categories satisfies excision
reviews.review_lede: The claim sharpens the additivity theorem of Waldhausen and the localisation theorem of Thomason–Trobaugh, extending excision to a much broader setting.

reviews.title: A short proof of the cap-set lower bound via polynomial multiplicities
reviews.review_lede: A self-contained note giving a streamlined proof of a known lower bound. The novelty is presentational.

reviews.title: Weak-type endpoint bounds for a class of bilinear Hilbert-transform operators
reviews.review_lede: A tightening of the known $L^p$ theory at the endpoint. Uses time-frequency tile decompositions and a Calderón–Zygmund argument adapted to the bilinear setting.

reviews.title: On the Riemann hypothesis: a proof via fine structure of the explicit formula
reviews.review_lede: The argument tries to upgrade the well-known positivity criterion (RH is equivalent to non-negativity of a particular quadratic form on test functions) by inserting a new family of test functions said to make the criterion verifiable.

reviews.title: Global regularity for the 3D Navier–Stokes equations via a conditional energy cascade
reviews.review_lede: The paper builds on Tao's averaged-Navier-Stokes program and claims that the obstruction Tao constructed actually cannot be embedded in the genuine equation. The argument introduces a 'cascade compatibility' invariant.
